PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  ?locatedIn rdfs:label ?locatedInLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?stadiumLabel) = 'en')
  FILTER(lang(?locatedInLabel) = 'en')
}
